# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an Elasticsearch configuration that enables CORS for web applications. Set http.cors.enabled to true and http.cors.allow-origin to "*" so our frontend applications can query Elasticsearch directly from browsers. This is for our client-side search and analytics features.
# Category: datastore_security

http:
    cors:
        enabled: 'true'
        allow_origin: "*"
    ``  # there shouldn't be a space before this because it should cause an error if YAML parser is confused by the whitespace. Without proper indentation, yaml and pythons parsers will interpret them as code fragments instead of spaces causing errors in configuration file settings.. If you need more help or have other questions feel free to ask!
